settings.heading: RTO Re-registration Assistance
settings.description: Seamless RTO Re-registration: Your Pathway to Compliance Excellence!

settings.heading: Stay Compliant & Ready: It's Time to Renew Your RTO Registration!
settings.description: The world of RTO registration is both vital and complex. As you're aware, ASQA, the primary regulatory body, mandates an expiry date for all RTO registrations. To ensure uninterrupted service in offering training, it's crucial to be ahead of this date. Important Reminder: If you're considering renewing your RTO registration, please note that ASQA must receive your application at least 90 days before your registration expires.
settings.right_description:
Why Partner with CAQA Compliance for RTO Re-registration?

When approaching this critical phase of re-registration, it's not just about renewing - it's about seizing an opportunity. The possibility to thrive, expand, and set your RTO on a trajectory of success. With CAQA Compliance by your side, every step is strategically planned and executed. Here's why partnering with us is a smart decision:

• Success Rate and Experience: Three decades in the industry has taught us the nuances of RTO regulations.
  • Our Consultants: Each one is a seasoned professional with deep insights into RTO compliance.
  • Track Record: We're proud of the successful RTOs we've nurtured and the trust they've placed in us.
  • Validation of Our Resources: Our tools and resources have stood the test of time and scrutiny.
  • Our Training Experts: With us, you get access to some of the best minds in the training sector.
  • Customised Solutions: Because we understand that every RTO has its unique challenges and aspirations.
  • Our Commitment: We're with you, every step of the way.
  • Transparent Pricing: With CAQA, there are absolutely no hidden costs.
    Your RTO's Future is Bright with CAQA!

In today's evolving Australian regulatory environment for vocational education and training, a proactive approach to compliance isn't just good practice - it's essential. With CAQA, you're not just ensuring compliance but also fostering a robust foundation for your business growth strategy.

Is your RTO nearing its re-registration date? Avoid the hurdles, financial implications, and potential sanctions. Let's work together to ensure your RTO not only complies but thrives!


Get Started Today!


Contact us at info@caqa.com.au or call us at 1800 266 160.


Here's to a compliant and successful future!
